zh.lifeSummary: Richard Oldham於1377年出生。他和Ann Mortimer至少有1個兒子。他去世於1415年享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Oldham于1377年出生。他和Ann Mortimer至少有1个儿子。他去世于1415年享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Oldham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from Oldham in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English ald ‘old’ + Old Norse holmr ‘island, water meadow’.
History: Colonist and trader John Oldham was born in Lancashire, England, c. 1600 and emigrated to North America in 1623, arriving at Plymouth, MA, in July on the ship Anne.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Oldham was born in 1377. He had at least 1 son with Ann Mortimer. He died in 1415, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Oldham est né en 1377. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ann Mortimer. Il est décédé en 1415, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Oldham wurde 1377 geboren. Er hatte mit Ann Mortimer mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1415 im Alter von 38 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Oldham è nato il nel 1377. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Ann Mortimer. Morì nel 1415, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Oldhamは1377年に生まれた。彼はAnn Mortimerとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1415年に38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Oldham(은)는 1377년 태어났다. 그는 Ann Mortimer(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1415년 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Oldham nasceu em 1377. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Ann Mortimer. Ele faleceu em 1415, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Oldham родился в 1377 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ann Mortimer. Он умер в 1415 г. в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Oldham nació en 1377. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Ann Mortimer. Murió en 1415, a la edad de 38 años.
